markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SEO performance and align content strategy with Exec's new product vision.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Product Strategy Shift:** Exec is evolving from a role-play point solution to an "AI native talent engine" to capitalize on market demand for tool consolidation.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [**New Pricing Model:** A new model—a fixed-price annual platform subscription with unlimited seats, plus usage-based add-ons (role plays, call scoring, human coaching)—will be launched soon.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [**Content Performance:** The new competitor comparison cluster shows high engagement (42 visitors MTD, majority engaged sessions), validating the strategy of targeting low-volume terms.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Attribution Gap:** The current last-click attribution model prevents analyzing lead quality by source. Sean will investigate automating UTMs for organic traffic to fix this.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Product & Business Strategy

  - [**Market Context:** Buyers are overwhelmed by disparate tools (LMS, LXP, role plays) and seek consolidation.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [**Exec's Vision:** Become the "AI native talent engine"—an all-in-one suite bundling:](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [AI Recruiting & Role Plays](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [AI Coaching (specific & general-purpose)](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
      - [LMS, CMS, & LXP](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [Human Coaching & Certifications](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [**Product Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
      - [**Live:** Call scoring (next few weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
      - [**In Progress:** Skill taxonomies/analytics, content management (LMS)](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
      - [**Q1 2026:** A la carte courses platform (vs. current cohort-based programs)](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [**New Pricing Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
      - [**Core Platform:** Fixed annual price for unlimited seats.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [**Usage-Based Add-ons:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
          - [Premium Seats → AI role plays & coaching](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
          - [Call Credits → Call scoring](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
          - [Coaching Credits → Human coaching sessions](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)

### SEO Performance & Attribution

  - [**Competitor Comparison Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Performance:** 42 organic/referral visitors MTD; majority are engaged sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Significance:** Validates the strategy of targeting low-volume terms to capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [**Attribution Gap:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current last-click attribution model prevents analyzing lead quality by source (e.g., organic vs. paid).](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Impact:** This blocks strategic decisions on audience targeting and content optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
      - [**Solution:** Sean will investigate automating UTMs for organic traffic to enable first-touch attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### On-Page SEO & Content Strategy

  - [**Blog Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [Articles now sort by `most_recently_updated_at` for better indexation.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [A homepage article block is built but on hold to avoid featuring only competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**AI Role Play Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Status:** Sean will implement the final content updates from Garrett's doc.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Goal:** Optimize for specific terms like "AI role play platform" while also ranking for broader "AI sales training software" keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [**New Solutions Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Plan:** Build "solutions" pages (e.g., Sales Training Software) by curating content blocks from existing product pages to tell a cohesive story.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Process:** Sean will share content drafts with the designer for layout, then implement.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [**Taxonomy & Footer:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [Jo will provide recommendations for a logical subfolder taxonomy (e.g., `/roleplays/dealership/`).](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [The footer will be updated to improve user experience and include key SEO pages.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [**Coaching Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Priority:** Lower than software-related terms due to a competitive niche.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A few blog posts could build topical authority for the domain, which Sean is open to.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sean:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Investigate automating UTMs for organic traffic to fix the attribution gap.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Implement final content updates on the AI Role Play page.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [Share content drafts for the Sales Roleplay and Coaching Platform pages with Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [Provide recommendations for a logical subfolder taxonomy.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [Propose updates for the website footer.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [Develop a content strategy proposal aligned with the new "AI native talent engine" vision.](https://fathom.video/share/-58upRDPFg_kY-51iw43RCXwfyz5trtv?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
